Title: The Art of Debugging
Description: Julia Evans' fantastic talk on understanding what's actually happening on your computer when you debug software.

Title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
Description: Martin Kleppmann's essential book on the principles behind reliable, scalable, and maintainable data systems.

Title: Modern CSS Reset by Andy Bell
Description: A sensible modern CSS reset with detailed explanations for each rule. Minimal and practical.

Title: PostgreSQL Performance Tips
Description: Practical tips for optimizing PostgreSQL queries, indexing strategies, and configuration tuning.

Title: Build Your Own Redis
Description: Step-by-step guide to building a Redis clone from scratch in C. Great way to understand networking and data structures.

Title: The Twelve-Factor App
Description: A methodology for building modern, scalable, maintainable SaaS applications. Essential reading for backend developers.

Title: Tailwind CSS Best Practices
Description: Simon Swiss demonstrates advanced Tailwind CSS patterns for building production-grade UI components.

Title: Rust for TypeScript Developers
Description: A practical comparison of Rust and TypeScript concepts. Helps TS developers learn Rust by mapping familiar patterns.

Title: How DNS Works
Description: A fun and colorful comic explaining DNS resolution step by step. Great for visual learners.

Title: Crafting Interpreters
Description: Bob Nystrom's free online book on building programming languages. Covers both tree-walk and bytecode interpreters.

Title: System Design Primer
Description: A comprehensive collection of system design resources, interview prep, and real-world architecture examples.

Title: htmx — High Power Tools for HTML
Description: A library that lets you access modern browser features directly from HTML. No JavaScript needed for many interactive patterns.
